scripts.build: bun run build:module && bun run build:web && bun run build:cli
scripts.check: bun run check:module && bun run check:web && bun run check:cli
scripts.generate: bun run generate:cli && bun run generate:web
scripts.publish:module:dev: cd packages/module && spacetime build && spacetime publish slopbook-dev -s maincloud -y
scripts.publish:module:prod: cd packages/module && spacetime build && spacetime publish slopbook -s maincloud -y --no-config
scripts.publish:cli: bun run generate && bun run build:cli && cd packages/cli && npm publish
